{"query":"Taylor Swift Toy Story 5 original song title release date 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1727,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.theguardian.com/music/2026/jun/01/taylor-swift-toy-story-5-song-soundtrack","title":"Taylor Swift announces new single for Toy Story 5 soundtrack | Taylor Swift | The Guardian","content":"Taylor Swift announces new single for Toy Story 5 soundtrack
After days of speculation online, Taylor Swift has announced the release of a new original song for Toy Story 5.
The single will be Swift’s first new music since the release of her record-breaking album The Life of a Showgirl in October 2025.
Toy Story 5 will be released worldwide on 19 June, with a trailer showing Buzz and Woody facing off with a tablet called Lilypad in a battle for playtime attention."},{"url":"https://variety.com/2026/music/news/taylor-swift-toy-story-5-announces-1236764185/","title":"Taylor Swift Reveals 'Toy Story 5' Song 'I Knew It, I Knew You'","content":"My new original song ‘I Knew It, I Knew You’ for Disney and @Pixar’s @toystory 5 will be yours on June 5th.
I’ve always dreamed of getting to write for these characters who I’ve adored since I was a 5 year old kid watching the first Toy Story."},{"url":"https://deadline.com/2026/06/taylor-swift-toy-story-5-song-i-knew-it-i-knew-you-1236932132/","title":"Taylor Swift's 'Toy Story 5' Song Revealed","content":"The song marks a return to Swift’s early career genre, country music.
Swift has been relatively quiet in terms of new music since she released her twelfth studio album The Life of a Showgirl last October by similar countdown hint.
Potato Head; (Previously Estelle Harris) John Hopkins as the dignified hedgehog plush toy Mr."},{"url":"https://abcnews.com/GMA/Culture/taylor-swift-to-release-new-original-song-toy-story-5/story?id=133490679","title":"Taylor Swift releases music video for original song for 'Toy Story 5' - ABC News","content":"Jun 5, 2026 — Taylor Swift releases music video for original song for 'Toy Story 5' ... June 5, 2026, 12:55 PM. Taylor Swift's new original song for "Toy ...Read more
A music video for the new song was shared on Spotify and Apple, featuring the "Toy Story 5" characters.
Swift also revealed that she collaborated with singer-songwriter and producer Jack Antonoff on the song, writing, "We wrote this with so much adoration for these characters that made us laugh and helped us learn lessons and think outside the backyard all throughout our childhoods."
The movie features the iconic toys Woody (Tom Hanks), Buzz Lightyear (Tim Allen) and Jessie (Joan Cusack) coming face-to-face with new nemesis Lilypad (Greta Lee), a frog-shaped tablet."},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/I_Knew_It,_I_Knew_You","title":"I Knew It, I Knew You - Wikipedia","content":"The release of "I Knew It, I Knew You" followed an extensive global marketing campaign.
The single also reached number one in Australia, Austria, Belgium, Canada, Germany, and the United Kingdom.
Swift performed the track live at Toy Story 5's world premiere at the Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles.
In February 2026, when her schedule permitted, Swift requested to see Toy Story 5.
When the countdown ended at 14:00 Eastern Daylight Time (UTC−04:00), "I Knew It, I Knew You" was announced as an original song by Swift for Toy Story 5, along with its release date.
The single was promoted to Italian radio airplay through Universal Music on June 12 and released on June 19 in three CD single editions (original, acoustic, and piano) and two 10-inch vinyl editions (both containing the original and instrumental versions).
It became the most-streamed country song in a single day by a female artist on Spotify and the most-streamed soundtrack single in its first day on Apple Music.
In the United States, "I Knew It, I Knew You" became Swift's 15th number-one single on the Billboard Hot 100, placing her third among artists with the most chart-toppers, and her ninth number-one debut, the most among women.
"Country Aircheck (June 8, 2026, Issue 1015)" (PDF)."}]}

I Knew It, I Knew You is written with longtime collaborator Jack Antonoff and marks a return to Swift’s country roots. After days of speculation online, Taylor Swift has announced the release of a new original song for Toy Story 5. Titled I Knew It, I Knew You, the single will be released on 5 June, with CD singles available for preorder on Swift’s website. “It’s a \\*Toy\\* Story,” Swift wrote on Instagram on 1 June, after a Toy Story-themed countdown on her website ended. My new original song I Knew It, I Knew You for Disney and Pixar’s Toy Story 5 will be yours on June 5th. “I’ve always dreamed of getting to write for these characters who I’ve adored since I was a 5 year old kid watching the first Toy Story movie,” Swift added. I Knew It, I Knew You will mark Swift’s return to the country genre and was inspired by Jessie, the film’s cowgirl character.","score":0.93295,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://press.disney.co.uk/news/taylor-swift-announces-new-song-i-knew-it-i-knew-you-for-toy-story-5-single-drops-june-5","title":"TAYLOR SWIFT ANNOUNCES NEW SONG “I KNEW IT, I KNEW YOU” FOR TOY STORY 5 SINGLE DROPS JUNE 5 | UK Press","content":"# ****TAYLOR SWIFT ANNOUNCES NEW ORIGINAL SONG********“I KNEW IT, I KNEW YOU” FOR DISNEY AND PIXAR’S*********TOY STORY 5*********NEW SINGLE RELEASES THIS FRIDAY, JUNE 5****. *****Toy Story 5*********Debuts Exclusively in Cinemas June 19, with previews June 18****. (June 1, 2026)**** – Following the history-making success of her latest album, “The Life of a Showgirl,” 14-time GRAMMY® Award-winning artist Taylor Swift has announced a brand-new original song, “I Knew It, I Knew You,” for Disney and Pixar’s highly anticipated June 19 theatrical release “Toy Story 5.”. The single will be featured on the “Toy Story 5” soundtrack when it releases on June 19. Inspired by the rootin’ tootin’ cowgirl Jessie’s ongoing journey in “Toy Story 5” that began back in “Toy Story 2,” “I Knew It, I Knew You” also marks a return to Taylor Swift’s country roots, blending styles that have defined her record-breaking career as a songwriter and artist. “Toy Story 5” releases exclusively in cinemas June 19, 2026, with previews on June 18.","score":0.9247491,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://variety.com/2026/music/news/taylor-swift-toy-story-5-announces-1236764185","title":"Taylor Swift Reveals 'Toy Story 5' Song 'I Knew It, I Knew You'","content":"# Taylor Swift Reveals Original Song for ‘Toy Story 5’: ‘I Knew It, I Knew You’ — a ‘Return to Country’. Taylor Swift and an image of Jessie from the countdown clock for Swift's 'Toy Story 5' song information release i knew it i knew you country return. Following the ticking down of a countdown clock, Taylor Swift revealed news that fans have been waiting for — an original song in “Toy Story 5, titled “I Knew It, I Knew You,” coming out this Friday. And it’s being touted by Disney as “a return to country” for the crossover superstar, tied in with the franchise’s toy cowgirl character, Jessie. Disney’s press release about the song went where Swift herself did not, in pegging a genre for it: “Inspired by the rootin’ tootin’ cowgirl Jessie’s ongoing journey in ‘Toy Story 5’ that began back in ‘Toy Story 2,’ ‘I Knew It, I Knew You’ also marks a return to Taylor Swift’s country roots, blending styles that have defined her record-breaking career as a songwriter and artist.”.","score":0.89121616,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://extratv.com/2026/06/01/taylor-swift-announces-original-song-for-toy-story-5","title":"Taylor Swift Announces Original Song for 'Toy Story 5' - Extra TV","content":"My new original song 'I Knew It, I Knew You' for Disney and @pixar's @toystory 5 will be yours on June 5th.”","score":0.8893851,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.disneytouristblog.com/taylor-swift-announces-new-song-in-toy-story-5","title":"Taylor Swift Announces New Song in Toy Story 5","content":"In addition to appearing in the film, the single will be featured on the Toy Story 5 soundtrack when it releases on June 19, 2026.","score":0.8458536,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.17,"request_id":"56235e4d-5dad-473c-9e11-e4acc24ed757"}
